/usr/bin/cc -Wl,--dependency-file,CMakeFiles/particles.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/particles.dir/particles.c.o CMakeFiles/particles.dir/__/deps/tinycthread.c.o CMakeFiles/particles.dir/__/deps/getopt.c.o -o particles  -Wl,-rpath,/home/kimdoleman/gitrepos/stormbrawler_projects/StormBrawler/glfw-3.4/build/src ../src/libglfw.so.3.4 -lm /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.a
